instruction: Create a Spring Boot REST controller for managing User entities with CRUD operations
Write a Spring Boot JPA repository interface for a Product entity with custom query methods
Create a Spring Boot service class with transaction management for Order processing
Write a Spring Boot configuration class for connecting to PostgreSQL with HikariCP connection pooling
Create a Spring Security configuration with JWT authentication for a REST API
Write a JWT utility class for Spring Boot with token generation and validation
Create a Spring Boot global exception handler with custom error responses
Write a Spring Boot JPA entity with auditing, validation, and relationships
Create a Spring Boot scheduled task service for background job processing
Write a Spring Boot integration test for a REST controller with MockMvc
Create a Spring Boot application.yml configuration for multiple environments
output:
# application.yml - Base configuration
spring:
  application:
    name: my-spring-boot-app
  profiles:
    active: ${SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE:dev}
  jackson:
    serialization:
      write-dates-as-timestamps: false
    default-property-inclusion: non_null
  jpa:
    open-in-view: false
    properties:
      hibernate:
        jdbc:
          batch_size: 25
        order_inserts: true
        order_updates: true

server:
  port: 8080
  error:
    include-message: always
    include-binding-errors: always

logging:
  level:
    root: INFO
    com.example: DEBUG
  pattern:
    console: "%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} - %msg%n"

---
# application-dev.yml - Development configuration
spring:
  config:
    activate:
      on-profile: dev
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/myapp_dev
    username: dev_user
    password: dev_password
    hikari:
      maximum-pool-size: 5
  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: update
    show-sql: true

logging:
  level:
    org.hibernate.SQL: DEBUG
    org.hibernate.type.descriptor.sql.BasicBinder: TRACE

---
# application-prod.yml - Production configuration
spring:
  config:
    activate:
      on-profile: prod
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:postgresql://${DB_HOST}:${DB_PORT}/${DB_NAME}
    username: ${DB_USERNAME}
    password: ${DB_PASSWORD}
    hikari:
      maximum-pool-size: 20
      minimum-idle: 5
      idle-timeout: 300000
      max-lifetime: 1200000
  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: validate
    show-sql: false

server:
  port: ${PORT:8080}

logging:
  level:
    root: WARN
    com.example: INFO
  file:
    name: /var/log/myapp/application.log

management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health,info,metrics,prometheus
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when_authorized

---
# application-test.yml - Test configuration
spring:
  config:
    activate:
      on-profile: test
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:h2:mem:testdb;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1
    driver-class-name: org.h2.Driver
  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: create-drop
    database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.H2Dialect
